narrative:
Blue Ash 2-C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,393 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
